news.t: First Trust Announces March 4, 2024 for Changes in Investment Strategies and Other Related Matters for Large Cap US Equity Select ETF

holdings.infoBox: SHRY is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are MetLife stock at 5.42%, QUALCOMM at 4.84%, Fox Corporation at 4.65%, PayPal Holdings at 4.32%, and D.R. Horton at 4.18%.

overview.description: The First Trust Bloomberg Shareholder Yield ETF (SHRY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Shareholder Yield index. The fund offers passive management by tracking an index of large- and mid-cap US equities that are selected and weighted based on shareholder yield characterized by dividends, net shares buybacks, and debt reduction. SHRY was launched on Jun 20, 2017 and is issued by First Trust.
